en: Simba I'm very disappointed in you I know You could have been killed You deliberately disobeyed
ko: 심바. 매우 실망했다. 알아요. 죽을 수도 있었어. 일부러 내 말을 안 들었지.

en: me And what's worse you put Nala in danger
ko: 더 나쁜 건 날라를 위험에 빠뜨렸어.

en: I was just trying to be brave like you I'm only brave when I have to be
ko: 그냥 아빠처럼 용감하고 싶었어요. 꼭 필요할 때만 용감한 거야.

en: Simba being brave doesn't mean you go looking for trouble But you're not scared of anything
ko: 심바, 용감하다고 위험을 찾아다니는 게 아니야. 근데 아빠는 아무것도 안 무서워하잖아요.

en: I was today You were Yes I thought I might lose you
ko: 오늘은 무서웠어. 무서웠다고요? 응 널 잃을 뻔했으니까.
